title: symphyotrichum ontarionis var. ontarionis
intro: Symphyotrichum ontarionis var. ontarionis, also known as Ontario coneflower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its purple coneflower-like blooms and tall stem. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum ontarionis var. ontarionis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
